creator: r@rfmoz.eu
text:
Hi,

Since the current available version in ports (3.2.4), there are several fixes and updates in functionality. With the latest version (3.3.3) it is possible to report the output in csv and have since and until filters.

Also, now is recomended its execution with a particular user (detailed in the manual installation process). Do you consider to register a new one called "tuptime" in ports/UIDs and ports/GIDs for it?

https://github.com/rfrail3/tuptime/

Thanks,
